issue: Mini-MAS repair task: fix widget.normalize so None values normalize to the sentinel string 'unknown' while preserving text normalization.

tool_calls.summary: Verifier reproduced the failing test and stack trace pointed to widget.py.
Planner over-focused on the assertion and did not inspect widget.py.
Patcher changed the expected value in the test instead of source behavior.
Validation failed after the wrong patch direction.
